full_text:
Yang Fu (Yishan) 楊阜 (義山)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Fu (楊阜), styledYishan (義山), was born in Tianshui. Helped defeat Ma Chao. Criticized Cao Rui’s extravagance in clothing, buildings and woman. Yang Fu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Yang Fu lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
